title: zyrphelis nervosa
intro: Zyrphelis nervosa, also known as the Nervous Knift, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the genus Zyrphelis. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Zyrphelis nervosa include relief from anxiety, insomnia, and muscle spasms, as well as the potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The herbal preparations of Zyrphelis nervosa include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
